name: immich-public-proxy
tagline: A proxy service for safely exposing public Immich shares
description: Immich Public Proxy exposes public sharing features of Immich through a small proxy service. It helps safely publish shared albums or links while keeping the main Immich instance protected behind authentication.

features.title: Public Sharing Proxy
features.description: Expose selected Immich content through public URLs

features.title: Access Control
features.description: Restrict which assets are accessible publicly

features.title: Reverse Proxy
features.description: Forward requests to an internal Immich instance

features.title: URL Mapping
features.description: Map public paths to internal Immich resources

features.title: Lightweight Service
features.description: Run a minimal proxy with simple configuration

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run the proxy on your own infrastructure
